input_data.code:
import os
def run_command(user_input):
    os.system(f"ls {user_input}")
    return "Command executed"

findings.title: OS Command Injection
findings.description: User input is directly concatenated into a shell command without sanitization, allowing arbitrary command execution
findings.fix: Use subprocess with shell=False and validate/sanitize input, or use shlex.quote() to escape shell metacharacters
